summary: The user is working on establishing a consistent bedtime and wake-up routine, finding success with reading before bed. They seek advice on maintaining a balance between consistency and flexibility in their wake-up time, as well as strategies to avoid hitting the snooze button in the morning.
facts: The user has been trying to wake up at 7:00 AM and plans to adjust this to 7:30 AM on weekends. The user has found that reading a book for at least 20 minutes before lights out helps them relax and reduce screen time. The user is interested in incorporating light stretching exercises and yoga poses into their morning routine. The user is considering using guided meditation apps like Headspace or Calm to help reduce stress and anxiety. The user plans to set aside time in the morning to plan their day and make a to-do list. The user has heard great things about guided meditation apps and is looking for recommendations. The user is interested in trying some simple neck and shoulder rolls as part of their morning stretching routine. The user has found that having a clear plan helps them feel more focused and motivated throughout the day.
